node.title: Uber | SDE 2 | Interview Experience | May 2024 | Google Referrals

topic.title: Uber | SDE 2 | Interview Experience | May 2024 | Google Referrals

post.content:
I gave Uber interviews in May 2024 for a SDE 2 position. Interviews were of medium difficulty level. Below is my experience.

**Experience - 3 years**
**Current Job - Google**

**Round 1: Screening**
There were 3 questions of medium difficulty and a time limit of 90 minutes. I solved all three of them.

**Round 2: DSA (1 hour)**
In this round there was 1 hard difficulty question based on stack. 

**Round 3: DSA (1 hour)**
This round involved questions on graph traversal and has 2 sub parts to solve.

**Round 4: LLD Round (1 hour)**
I was asked to come up with LLD of a restaurant service using OOPs, SOLID priciples, etc.

**Round 5: HLD (1 hour)**
I was asked to come up with HLD of a chat application.

**Round 6: Hiring Manager Round**
It was a behavioral round and there were questions like why I am leaving my current company and why I would like to join Uber and some discussion on my expectations. There were questions about the previous project, my contributions to design and development, how I handled conflicts and collaborated with other teams etc..

**Result** - I got the offer to join Uber

**Google is hiring for multiple positions currently, if you are interested fill this goole form and I will refer you https://forms.gle/iod1RA93C8okSQRg7**

Hi Op! , congrats for the offer, can you just elaborate each round ,what questions were asked , and if you asked for the hints , and also compensation details, did you negotiate ?\nand if you joined the company ,how is the work culture , thanks in advance !
